'''Rogh'ma Ixsan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who served under [[Sebolto]]'s employ and was also involved with a crime syndicate called [[RavinsBlud Crime Syndicate|RavinsBlud]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Police]] for the questioning, involved in smuggling [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]. His bounty that was worth 3,000 credits alive and 1,500 dead was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
